title: ADR-0020: MCP cell-discovery routing (discover-once-pin-421)
verdict_summary: Canonical ADR (not superseded/stub) recording the implementation decision for ENG-1401's MCP leg: the global-entry cell-discovery routing (discover-once-then-pin resolver keyed by account, 308 redirect at the global entry, 421-only pin invalidation self-heal, SOLO_CELL short-circuit, fail-closed CELL_UNRESOLVED/CELL_DISCOVERY_UNAVAILABLE). All requirement IDs it *references* are canon defined elsewhere and are already covered by stories (FR-M17 → E5-S1/E5-S3, FR-M18 → E5-S3/E7-S2, NFR-M1 → E7-S2/E1-S1, NFR-M3 → E5-S1/E5-S2). The named components exist on main (audit @ be3cd8b: 'discovery/resolver + 421/308 routing src/routing/*; tests test/routing/cell-resolver.test.ts (14) + test/transport/cell-routing.test.ts (9)'). One genuine coverage gap: the ADR's own core deliverable — the discover-once-pin/308/421 routing behavior — is NOT the subject of any story's acceptance criteria. It appears only as ambient audit context inside E5-S3, whose ACs verify only the day-1 cell contract (CELL_ID/CLUSTER_NAME/healthz/orvexcell/topic), and E7-S2 (shim-overhead + revocation-lag SLI) does not exercise the resolve+redirect leg. In a verify+harden program this leaves a live, load-bearing routing seam with no verifying story.

gaps.requirement: MCP global-entry cell-discovery routing behavior (ADR-0020 Decisions 1-6): discover-once-then-pin resolver keyed by account with cellEpoch monotonicity, global-entry 308 redirect with zero session/tool-call creation, 421-only pin invalidation self-heal, SOLO_CELL zero-discovery short-circuit, fail-closed typed CELL_UNRESOLVED (400) / CELL_DISCOVERY_UNAVAILABLE (503), and jti-replay ordering at the mismatch guard.
gaps.quote: Discover-once-then-pin, keyed by account. src/routing/cell-resolver.ts resolves via the frozen cell-discovery-contracts API ... 421-only invalidation. The pin is invalidated ONLY by handleMisdirected(account) ... Global entry (globalEntryHost set): every /mcp request full-verifies the JWT, resolves the cell host, and issues a 308 redirect. No McpServer/session is ever created ... (AC6 — the global entry sees exactly one resolve, zero tool calls).
gaps.why_uncovered: No story title or acceptance criterion covers the routing/resolver behavior. It is live code on main (be3cd8b: 'discovery/resolver + 421/308 routing src/routing/*') but surfaces only as ambient audit context in E5-S3, whose 5 ACs verify solely the day-1 cell contract (healthz echo, cell-scoped topic, orvexcell fail-closed, missing-CELL_ID startup). E7-S2 (NFR-M1) exercises only in-cell shim-overhead + revocation-lag SLIs, not the resolve+redirect leg (its cell-routing-sli budget). The self-heal (421 → invalidate → re-resolve), the 308 global-entry front-door split, SOLO_CELL short-circuit, and the two fail-closed typed errors have no verifying AC in the 575-story set.
gaps.suggested_home: New verify+harden story in mcp E5 (Statelessness, revocation consumer & day-1 cell contract) covering the cell-resolver discover-once-pin + 421/308 routing and its two fail-closed typed errors; plus a resolve+redirect SLI slice added to E7-S2 (NFR-M1) or a sibling story. Alternatively widen E5-S3's ACs to include the routing behavior it already audits. Tie to existing issue ENG-1401 (the MCP leg).
gaps.verdict: CONFIRMED — ADR-0020 (slug 9KcwAG5SRg) re-verified live canon, status Canonical, dated 2026-07-10, not superseded (docmost-cli page get). Requirement is genuinely uncovered: grep of scratchpad/feature-map.txt for cell-resolver/discover-once/308/421/SOLO_CELL/CELL_UNRESOLVED/CELL_DISCOVERY_UNAVAILABLE/globalEntryHost/cell-discovery finds no hits; grep of every breakdown/*/plan.json and breakdown/mcp/bodies/*.md for the same terms finds exactly one hit — E5-S3.md's audit-context line (ambient 'discovery routing' evidence, be3cd8b) — and E5-S3's own title/ACs are explicitly scoped to the day-1 cell contract (CELL_ID/CLUSTER_NAME/healthz/orvexcell/topic), not the resolver/redirect leg; E7-S2's ACs (shim-overhead, consumer-lag, golden-tape KPI, /health liveness) likewise never exercise resolve+redirect. audit.json's E5-S3 evidence list bundles src/routing/cell-resolver.ts + discovery-client.ts under the same 'present' verdict as the healthz/topic work, which is exactly the audit-vs-AC conflation the gap flags. No pack issue owns it as already-scheduled definition-phase work: ENG-2102 ([FACTORY] orvex-studio-mcp Service Definition Pack, Wave-3 delta) is still status Todo (uncertified), its SDD-completeness AC5 names the ~19-tool surface + studio_* + three upstreams + cell-lint + SLOs but never names cell-discovery routing/ADR-0020, and E5-S1/E5-S3/E7-S2 are blocked-by ENG-2102 only for the contract-TAG dispatch gate, not for story-generation scope — so ENG-2102 completing does not itself retrofit an AC here. ENG-2689/2690 are the unrelated browser-extension component pack, not MCP. This is build/verify work (a load-bearing, already-shipped routing seam with a named-test DoD pattern matching every sibling story), not process/ops. Gap stands.

components.quote: Two deployment-mode split at the transport boundary, discriminated by cfg.globalEntryHost (src/transport/http.ts)

components.quote: the resolve+redirect leg has its own budget, measured network-inclusive in test/transport/cell-routing-sli.test.ts

components.quote: resolves via the frozen cell-discovery-contracts API (GET /v1/cell-discovery/{account})
